QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: operatorID
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Pilot registration code or identification number (max 20 characters).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Operator ID

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: operatorIDValid
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Operator ID is valid
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Operator ID has been checked using checksum.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Operator ID is valid

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: operatorIDType
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Format of the operator ID (currently CAA only).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Operator ID type

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: sendOperatorID
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Broadcast the operator identification information via Remote ID.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: When enabled, sends operator ID message
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Broadcast

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: selfIDFree
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Flight purpose description to broadcast (max 23 characters).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Optional plain text for operator to specify operations data (Free Text). Maximum 23 characters.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Flight Purpose

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: selfIDEmergency
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Emergency status text to broadcast (max 23 characters).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Optional plain text for operator to specify operations data (Emergency Text). Maximum 23 characters.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Emergency Text

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: selfIDExtended
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Extended operational status information to broadcast (max 23 characters).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Optional plain text for operator to specify operations data (Extended Text). Maximum 23 characters.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Extended Status

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: selfIDType
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Type of self-ID message to broadcast (flight purpose, emergency, or extended).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Broadcast Message

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: sendSelfID
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Broadcast flight purpose or emergency status information via Remote ID.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: When enabled, sends self ID message
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Broadcast

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: basicID
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Drone serial number or registration code to transmit (max 20 characters).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Basic ID

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: basicIDType
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Format of the drone ID (CAA registration, serial number, or UTM assigned).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Basic ID Type

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: basicIDUaType
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Classification of the unmanned aircraft (multirotor, fixed-wing, etc.).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: UA type

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: sendBasicID
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Broadcast the drone identification information via Remote ID.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: When enabled, sends basic ID message
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Broadcast

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: region
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Regulatory region for Remote ID compliance (FAA or EU).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: The region of operation the mission will take place in
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Region of operation

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: locationType
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Source for operator location data (live GNSS or fixed coordinates).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.enumStrings: Takeoff(Not Supported),Live GNNS, Fixed (not for FAA)
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Location Type

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: latitudeFixed
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Fixed latitude for operator location when not using live GNSS.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Fixed latitude to send on SYSTEM message
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Latitude Fixed

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: longitudeFixed
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Fixed longitude for operator location when not using live GNSS.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Fixed Longitude to send on SYSTEM message
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Longitude Fixed

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: altitudeFixed
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Fixed altitude for operator location when not using live GNSS.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Fixed Altitude to send on SYSTEM message
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Altitude Fixed

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: classificationType
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Classification standard to use for Remote ID (undeclared or EU).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Classification Type

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: categoryEU
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: EU classification category for the UAS (Open, Specific, or Certified).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Category of the UAS in the EU region
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Category

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: classEU
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: EU equipment class designation (Class 0 through Class 6).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Class of the UAS in the EU region
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Class
